summary: Iteration 351 - Netflix-style Dashboard Redesign Testing Complete. All major features verified working: Hero section with carousel (5 dots, clickable), FEATURED badge, two CTAs, hook text. Trending Now and Just Dropped horizontal scroll rows with 4:5 story cards showing badges (TRENDING/HOT/NEW). Scroll hook 'You won't believe what happens next...' visible. Quick Tools at bottom. 'Popular Characters' correctly removed. '30 seconds' claim replaced with 'Stories ready in minutes'. Story card clicks navigate to story-video-studio. One minor issue: Credits display shows literal '...' dots instead of loading skeleton when credits is null.

ui_bugs.issue: Credits display shows literal '...' text when credits is null instead of loading skeleton (animate-pulse)
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Replace `credits === null ? '...'` with a loading skeleton span like `<span className='w-8 h-3 bg-white/10 rounded animate-pulse' />`

action_items: Fix credits display in Dashboard.js line 577 to show loading skeleton instead of literal '...' dots
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js Netflix-style layout is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
HeroSection carousel with 5 dots works correctly - dots are clickable and change hero content
ScrollRow component properly implements horizontal scroll with arrow navigation
StoryCard component has 4:5 aspect ratio with hover scale effect (1.05)
SafeImage component handles expired R2 URLs gracefully with gradient fallbacks
ScrollHook component shows gradient text 'You won't believe what happens next...'
QuickTools section at bottom shows compact tool chips
No '30 seconds' claim - replaced with 'Stories ready in minutes'
Minor: Credits display on line 577 shows '...' text instead of loading skeleton when credits is null

success_rate.frontend: 95% (14/15 features verified, 1 minor credits display issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Netflix-style Dashboard redesign verified. All major features working: Hero carousel (5 dots, clickable), FEATURED badge, Continue Story + Create Your Own CTAs, Trending Now row, Just Dropped row, Scroll Hook, Quick Tools. Story cards have 4:5 aspect ratio with gradient overlays and badges. R2 presigned URLs expired so SafeImage shows gradient fallbacks (expected). Minor issue: credits display shows '...' text instead of loading skeleton.

Feature_1_Dashboard_Loads.details: Dashboard loads after login without errors

Feature_2_Hero_Section.details: Hero section renders with title, hook text, FEATURED badge, animation style badge

Feature_3_Hero_CTAs.details: Two CTAs present: 'Continue Story' and 'Create Your Own'

Feature_4_Hero_Carousel_Dots.details: 5 carousel dots visible and clickable - clicking changes hero content

Feature_5_Create_Prompt_Bar.details: Create Prompt bar visible with search input and 4 chip suggestions

Feature_6_Trending_Now_Row.details: Trending Now horizontal scroll row renders with 20 story cards

Feature_7_Story_Cards.details: Story cards show 4:5 aspect ratio with gradient overlays, title, hook text, badges (TRENDING/HOT/NEW), and 'Continue Story' CTA

Feature_8_Just_Dropped_Section.details: Just Dropped section renders below the scroll hook

Feature_9_Scroll_Hook.details: Scroll hook text 'You won't believe what happens next...' appears between sections

Feature_10_Quick_Tools.details: Quick Tools row at bottom shows compact tool chips (Story Video, Reels, Comic Book, Bedtime Story, Caption AI)

Feature_11_Popular_Characters_Removed.details: No 'Popular Characters' section visible (correctly removed by design)

Feature_12_30_Seconds_Claim_Removed.details: No '30 seconds' claim anywhere - replaced with 'Stories ready in minutes'

Feature_13_Story_Card_Navigation.details: Clicking story cards navigates to story-video-studio

Feature_14_Create_Your_Own_Navigation.details: Clicking 'Create Your Own' navigates to story-video-studio

Feature_15_Credits_Display.details: Credits display shows literal '...' dots when credits is null instead of loading skeleton

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocking. R2 presigned URLs are expired so SafeImage shows gradient fallbacks (expected behavior).
